Zillow synthetic-fixture nav (placeholder)

456 Fixture Ln, Redmond, WA 98052

2 bd | 2.0 ba | 1,100 sqft | Built 2008 | Condominium

Listed at $450,000 — synthetic fixture for D-13-MUSTHAVE-01 partial path.

HOA: $425 / month. Days on Zillow: 7.

About 456 Fixture Ln

Synthetic placeholder prose for fixture byte-padding. This text exists solely to push the condo fixture above the MIN_BODY_BYTES = 5000 threshold so that block-detection cheap-first ordering in lib.property_block_detector.detect_block does NOT fire body_too_short on this fixture. We want the happy-but-partial path: status 200, body length above 5000, no captcha phrase, present __NEXT_DATA__, and the Sonnet output returns tax_annual=null. The envelope is still shape-1.

Generic synthetic-condo prose continues. Open floor plan (placeholder). In-unit washer dryer (placeholder). Secured building entry (placeholder). Shared rooftop deck (placeholder). One reserved parking stall in below-grade garage (placeholder). HOA covers exterior maintenance, common-area utilities, and trash (placeholder). The tax_annual field is intentionally absent from the synthetic __NEXT_DATA__ payload below so the mock-Sonnet output can model the partial-extraction path: a condo whose HOA scrapes successfully but whose taxAnnualAmount field is missing from Zillow's payload at scrape time.

School fixture placeholder: Elementary school rating 9/10 (synthetic), Middle school rating 8/10 (synthetic), High school rating 9/10 (synthetic). These ratings exist only to fatten the fixture body past MIN_BODY_BYTES; no inference about a real school system is intended. Phase 14 reference data (Phase 16 plan) will fill in any real per-zip values that the analysis pipeline requires; this fixture only needs to be ingestible.

Neighborhood (synthetic)

Synthetic neighborhood paragraph. Fixture-village-east is a synthetic neighborhood that exists only inside this HTML file. Walkable placeholder shops, placeholder grocery, placeholder park. The neighborhood paragraph exists to add bytes to the fixture body so the block-detection threshold check passes. No real-world inference about any real Redmond, WA neighborhood is intended; the 98052 ZIP is preserved so downstream Phase 14 per-zip tax-rate lookups can run their normal code path against a real ZIP.

Walkability synthetic score: 72/100. Transit synthetic score: 58/100. Bike synthetic score: 70/100. Synthetic scores are illustrative for fixture shape; not authoritative; not from any real third-party scoring service.
